samples.text: If the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius, then it boils. The water reaches 100 degrees celsius. Does it follow that it boils?
Whenever the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius, it boils as a result. In this case the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius. Can we conclude that it boils?
If the water hits boiling point, then it starts boiling. The water hits boiling point. Does it follow that it starts boiling?
The condition for 'it boils' is met because the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius. Does it follow that it boils?
If the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius, then it boils. The water reaches 100 degrees celsius. The report is due on Friday. Does it follow that it boils?
